creator: umq@ueo.co.jp
text:
Hi,

If you want to build the port with libmilter installed with
mail/sendmail port, setting WITH_SENDMAIL_PORT will pass the library
path to the linker.

The patch is not needed.

Regards.


-- 

	Hirohisa Yamaguchi
	  umq@ueo.co.jp
 
At Mon, 11 Feb 2008 14:50:04 UT,
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> 
> Maintainer of mail/dkim-milter,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/120535 has just been submitted.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/120535
